finding: Para-fluorine substitution on the pendant phenyl ring improved biochemical potency approximately 3-fold relative to the unsubstituted analog.
evidence_quote: Introduction of a para-fluorine atom at the phenyl terminus resulted in a ~3-fold potency improvement (IC50 45 nM -> 12 nM).

finding: Ortho-methoxy substitution on the pyridine ring reduced cellular activity relative to the unsubstituted parent compound.
evidence_quote: The ortho-methoxy analog showed 7-fold reduced cellular potency versus the unsubstituted parent.

finding: Pyridine core replacement of benzene improved selectivity for KRAS G12C over wild-type KRAS.
evidence_quote: Replacement of the benzene core with pyridine improved selectivity for the G12C mutant over wild-type KRAS.
